segments.text: He was wrapping up with nairs and up airs and stuff
segments.original_text: 空Nとか空上とかで締めてたんで

segments.text: So that's proper edgeguarding right there
segments.original_text: ちゃんと崖に追い出すから

segments.text: On Final Destination though, one touch sends him flying off the edge right away, but
segments.original_text: 終点だとワンタッチですぐに崖外に追い出されちゃうんですけど

segments.text: If you're knocking him down, you do it right on the platform edge
segments.original_text: 転ばすなら台をギリギリで

full_text: He was wrapping up with nairs and up airs and stuff So that's proper edgeguarding right there On Final Destination though, one touch sends him flying off the edge right away, but If you're knocking him down, you do it right on the platform edge Keep launching him

corrections.original: クーエヌとか空中ショーとか
